pi_items.source: export_result.sh explicitly writes to this file path, and verifier.py reads from it.
verifier.py uses these exact keys and values as the expected quantities for evaluating the target scrap orders.
verifier.py specifically evaluates SCRAP-004 to ensure it remains untouched (0 scrap orders) to award the 15 distractor points.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes synthetically generated product and inventory data injected via Odoo XML-RPC in setup_task.sh. The verified target products and their required scrap quantities match the metadata claims exactly: SCRAP-001 (15), SCRAP-002 (8), SCRAP-003 (3), SCRAP-005 (25), and SCRAP-006 (6). The distractor product SCRAP-004 is explicitly verified by the verifier to remain unscrapped. The pass_threshold of 55 points is correctly enforced by the verifier logic, and all final data is verified to be exported to /tmp/scrap_task_result.json.
